name: Tra Mam Xoi Fact Check
description: Video giáo dục sức khỏe tiếng Việt, giải thích trà mâm xôi một cách thận trọng và không phóng đại công dụng y khoa.
story: Một video fact-check ngắn giải thích vì sao 'trà mâm xôi' dễ gây nhầm lẫn: có thể là trà hương/quả mâm xôi hoặc trà lá mâm xôi đỏ. Nội dung nêu lợi ích thực tế như đồ uống ít đường/không caffeine nếu chọn đúng loại, đồng thời cảnh báo rằng các lời đồn về thai kỳ, chuyển dạ hay công dụng y khoa cần được kiểm chứng và nên hỏi chuyên gia y tế.

characters.name: Health Educator
characters.description: Vietnamese woman in her early 30s with warm professional presence, shoulder-length dark hair, natural makeup, wearing a simple cream blouse and neutral blazer, calm trustworthy expression, clean modern health educator look.
characters.voice_description: Calm Vietnamese female narrator, clear and reassuring, speaks at a measured educational pace

characters.name: Kitchen Studio
characters.description: Bright modern kitchen studio with natural window light, light wood counter, white ceramic tiles, small potted herbs, clean educational video setup, warm realistic atmosphere.

characters.name: Tea Table
characters.description: Minimal tabletop set with a glass teapot, transparent cup, raspberry-colored herbal tea, fresh raspberries, dried leaves in a small bowl, soft daylight, clean health documentary style.

characters.name: Clinic Desk
characters.description: Clean consultation desk in a modern clinic, notebook, pen, neutral wall, soft daylight, calm safe healthcare atmosphere, no patients visible.

characters.name: Raspberry Tea Cup
characters.description: Clear glass cup filled with deep pink raspberry herbal tea, gentle steam, saucer, realistic fresh raspberries nearby, no label, no text.

characters.name: Dried Raspberry Leaves
characters.description: Small ceramic bowl of dried raspberry leaves beside a wooden spoon, natural texture, clean macro food photography style, no label, no text.

characters.name: Fact Check Cards
characters.description: Blank neutral cards arranged on a desk for visual metaphor of fact checking, clean paper texture, no readable text, no logos.
